title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zoho Corporation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zoho Corporation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Zoho Corporation in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zoho Corporation:
Zoho Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation!
